requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Basis and Jordan Site Settings

summary.en: Jordan and China both use a 50 Hz power-system basis, which helps PCS, transformer, and auxiliary-load screening. The frequency match does not remove the need for Jordan-specific voltage, protection, power-quality, grounding, communications, metering, dispatch, and commissioning settings at the actual point of connection.
summary.zh: 约旦和中国均以50Hz电力系统为基础，这有助于PCS、变压器和辅助负载筛查。但频率一致并不免除实际接入点的约旦特定电压、保护、电能质量、接地、通信、计量、调度和调试整定。
summary.zht: 約旦和中國均以50Hz電力系統為基礎，這有助於PCS、變壓器和輔助負載篩查。但頻率一致並不免除實際接入點的約旦特定電壓、保護、電能品質、接地、通訊、計量、調度和調試整定。

standards_or_laws: Project-specific protection, power-quality, metering, and commissioning studies
EMRC regulatory or licensing conditions where applicable

summary.en: China 50 Hz PCS factory settings and GB/T 36558-2023 system evidence are useful starting points. They should be revalidated for Jordan voltage class, transformer taps, local protection settings, utility frequency and voltage ride-through windows, harmonics, grounding, ambient conditions, and communications.
summary.zh: 中国50Hz PCS出厂整定和GB/T 36558-2023系统证据是有用起点。仍应针对约旦电压等级、变压器分接、当地保护整定、电网频率和电压穿越窗口、谐波、接地、环境条件和通信重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國50Hz PCS出廠整定和GB/T 36558-2023系統證據是有用起點。仍應針對約旦電壓等級、變壓器分接、當地保護整定、電網頻率和電壓穿越窗口、諧波、接地、環境條件和通訊重新驗證。

gap.en: Produce Jordan-specific relay settings, grid model, power-quality study, short-circuit study, SCADA protocol, commissioning plan, and site acceptance records instead of relying only on China factory settings.
gap.zh: 应制作约旦特定继电保护整定、电网模型、电能质量研究、短路研究、SCADA协议、调试计划和现场验收记录，而不是仅依赖中国出厂整定。
gap.zht: 應製作約旦特定繼電保護整定、電網模型、電能品質研究、短路研究、SCADA協議、調試計劃和現場驗收記錄，而不是僅依賴中國出廠整定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected BESS where utility interconnection, EMRC conditions, grid-code, EPC, owner, insurer, lender, or commissioning approval applies; details are project and connection-point specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or contract-specific for China grid-connected projects through grid-company technical review, connection agreement, and commissioning acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The 50 Hz match is helpful engineering context, not an interconnection approval. Jordan site settings and utility commissioning remain separate requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 50Hz一致是有帮助的工程背景，不是并网批准。约旦场址整定和公用事业单位调试仍是单独要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 50Hz一致是有幫助的工程背景，不是併網批准。約旦場址整定和公用事業單位調試仍是單獨要求。
